name: English

hero.headline: Global Company Structures, Built for Founders Who Move Fast
hero.subtitle: Launch, bank and structure your international business with a compliance-first partner across the UAE, Bahrain, Hong Kong, Singapore and Ireland.

tone_note: Website tone: premium, direct and compliance-led. Use the figures below as baseline marketing facts and verify final legal/tax wording before publishing.

uae.name: United Arab Emirates (UAE)
uae.description: Gulf hub for companies that need regional credibility, banking access and investor/residency pathways.

tax_baseline.label: Tax baseline
tax_baseline.value: 9% Corporate Tax / 0% on Foreign Income / 0% Personal Income Tax

setup_timeline.label: Setup timeline
setup_timeline.value: Approx. 30 days, including required in-person huddle / medical visit

company_registration.title: Company Registration & Setup
company_registration.description: Launch your United Arab Emirates (UAE) company through a clean, end-to-end formation path designed for founders who need speed, credibility and compliant execution. GCC Startup coordinates the name reservation, approvals, license filing and local statutory steps so your business can move from idea to operating structure with confidence.
company_registration.requirements: Typical requirements: Passport copies, proof of address, proposed company names and business activity details.

bank_account.title: Global & Local Bank Account Setup
bank_account.description: Build the financial rails your company needs from day one. We prepare the corporate profile, ownership story and business model documentation for local banks and trusted fintech platforms, helping your account application look clear, credible and investor-ready.
bank_account.requirements: Typical requirements: Corporate documents, UBO/KYC records, shareholder background profile and bank reference or statement history where required.

nominee_ubo.title: Nominee UBO - Tier 02 Privacy Package
nominee_ubo.description: Protect public-facing exposure while staying aligned with compliance expectations. Our nominee privacy structure is supported by due diligence, legal declarations and control documentation so operational rights remain clearly protected.
nominee_ubo.requirements: Typical requirements: KYC clearance, beneficiary identity records and signed trust/authorization documentation.

tax_residency.title: Personal Tax Residency & Visas
tax_residency.description: Create a personal footprint around your company with practical residency, tax-positioning and substance guidance. We support document preparation, local appointments and compliance checkpoints so your structure is more than a registration on paper.
tax_residency.requirements: Typical requirements: Passport or entry records, biometrics/medical checks where applicable, local substance records and tax-residency evaluation files.

extracted.s0: Yes, entirely. We register legitimate companies in jurisdictions that have actual legislative tax advantages — that is tax optimization, not tax evasion. Every structure we build is fully compliant with FATF, OECD, and local regulations. Tax planning within the law is standard practice for businesses of every size.
extracted.s1: A Nominee Ultimate Beneficial Owner appears as the registered owner of the company while the actual owner retains full control and access. This is legal, widely used for legitimate privacy purposes, and GCCStartup assumes the nominee's legal liability while you keep complete operational control.
extracted.s2: For Hong Kong, Singapore, and Ireland — no. Everything is handled remotely. For UAE, Bahrain, and Oman, traditional banking setup requires an in-person visit of approximately 30 days. We also offer a remote option for Gulf jurisdictions that does not include personal tax residency.
extracted.s3: Hong Kong and Singapore are ideal if you want fast, fully remote setup with fintech banking and no requirement to physically relocate. UAE and Bahrain are the stronger choice if you need credible local banking, personal tax residency, or are planning to move to the Gulf region.
extracted.s4: Yes. Many of our clients hold entities in two or three jurisdictions simultaneously. A common setup: Hong Kong for digital income, UAE for Gulf banking credibility, and Ireland for EU operations. GCCStartup manages all of them under a unified service agreement.
extracted.s5: Shelf companies are typically handed over within 24–48 hours. These are pre-registered entities with existing bank accounts and transaction history, making them ideal when you need to demonstrate an established company presence or begin operating immediately.
extracted.s6: Yes. Nominee arrangements are a long-established, legal tool for legitimate privacy. The structure is fully disclosed to banks and authorities where required; it is privacy, not concealment. We comply with all KYC, FATF and CRS obligations.
extracted.s7: Free zones give 100% ownership, fast setup and are ideal for services, e-commerce and holding. Mainland is best if you need to trade directly with the UAE market or take government contracts. We recommend based on your actual activity.
extracted.s8: Hong Kong is territorial: profits not sourced in Hong Kong are not taxed. If your clients, work and operations are outside Hong Kong, you can apply for an Offshore Profits Tax Exemption. We help document and file the claim correctly.
extracted.s9: Yes — fintech accounts (Wise, Airwallex, Statrys) onboard fully online. Local Tier-1 banks usually require one in-person meeting, which we arrange. Many clients use both: a fintech account immediately and a local account in parallel.
extracted.s10: Yes. A shelf company is simply a previously-registered, dormant entity that has been kept compliant and is now transferred to a new owner. It is a long-standing, legal practice. You complete full KYC before the transfer.
extracted.s11: Irish companies need at least one EEA-resident director, OR a Section 137 non-resident directors’ bond if none of the directors are EEA-resident. We arrange the bond so non-EEA founders can own and direct the company.
extracted.s12: Yes. They are legitimate, internationally recognised structures used by funds, multinationals and private clients. We build them in full compliance with economic-substance rules, FATF and CRS reporting obligations.
extracted.s13: GCC Startup provides a nominated Ultimate Beneficial Owner so your name stays off the public record. You retain complete control and bank access; we assume the nominee’s legal liability. Our most requested service.
extracted.s14: Yes — Bahrain levies no corporate income tax on most commercial activities (oil & gas is the main exception). For trading, consulting, e-commerce and holding companies, profits are untaxed at the corporate level.
extracted.s15: Bahrain offers similar Gulf credibility and 0% corporate tax at a lower cost, plus direct access to Saudi Arabia. The UAE wins on global brand recognition and lifestyle; Bahrain wins on price and Saudi proximity.
extracted.s16: Company registration and all government/authority fees for your chosen jurisdiction. Bank accounts are $500 each. Some jurisdictions carry higher official fees — we confirm the exact all-in figure before you pay.
extracted.s17: No. You hold a Declaration of Trust and Power of Attorney confirming you as the true owner, and you control the bank account. The nominee acts only on your instruction and cannot transact or transfer ownership.
extracted.s18: Availability varies. Some are a few months old, others several years, with correspondingly longer banking and transaction history. Price reflects age and history — older, more-established entities cost more.
extracted.s19: There is no public register of beneficial owners. Information is held privately by the registered agent and disclosed only to competent authorities under law — far more confidential than onshore registers.
extracted.s20: The headline rate is 17%, but the Start-Up Tax Exemption and partial exemptions substantially reduce tax on the first years of profit — an effective rate around 5% is common for qualifying new companies.
extracted.s21: Yes. We quote a single all-in figure that includes official registration fees for your chosen jurisdiction. Bank accounts and optional add-ons (e.g. nominee) are priced separately and disclosed up front.
extracted.s22: For full residency and local banking, yes — a short visit of around a week is required for biometrics, the medical and bank KYC. We also offer a remote setup option that excludes personal tax residency.
extracted.s23: "As a German developer I was paying 42% effective tax. GCCStartup structured my Singapore entity and it is the best financial decision I've made. The founder actually understands international finance."
extracted.s24: Singapore law requires at least one director who is ordinarily resident in Singapore. We provide a professional nominee director to satisfy this while you retain full beneficial ownership and control.
extracted.s25: A TRC is an official document proving you are tax-resident in that country — essential for claiming double-tax treaty benefits and demonstrating your status to other authorities. We obtain it for you.
extracted.s26: Download the GCCStartup Tax Optimization Guide below. It explains how online sellers, freelancers and consultants can explore Hong Kong company structures, fintech banking and legal tax optimization.
extracted.s27: You are recorded as the Ultimate Beneficial Owner and director of the company. There is no nominee — your name appears on the corporate register. It is the most transparent and lowest-cost structure.
extracted.s28: No, but residency must be genuine. We advise on the presence and substance needed to keep your tax residency robust and treaty-compliant, including the role of the 183-day test in your home country.
extracted.s29: The UAE is the most popular for lifestyle, banking and recognition. Bahrain is more cost-effective with 0% corporate tax. Oman is a quieter alternative. We recommend based on your goals and budget.
extracted.s30: Local Tier-1 banks generally require one in-person meeting. If you want fully remote banking, we pair your UAE company with a fintech account (Wise, Airwallex) while the local account is arranged.
extracted.s31: Pre-registered entities with an existing bank account and transaction history, transferred to you and operational within 24–48 hours. For when you need an established company presence immediately.
extracted.s32: Yes — it is a long-established, legal privacy tool, fully disclosed to banks and authorities where required. It is privacy, not concealment, and we comply with all KYC, FATF and CRS obligations.
extracted.s33: Certain activities (e.g. finance, IP) require local substance. Pure equity-holding companies have light substance requirements. We assess your activity and ensure the structure meets the rules.
extracted.s34: Corporate tax is 9% on taxable profit above AED 375,000; profit below that is 0%. Qualifying free-zone income can remain at 0%. We structure your entity to use every relief you are entitled to.
extracted.s35: UAE, Bahrain and Oman offer full personal tax residency with residence visas, Emirates ID and family sponsorship. We handle the entire process — from company to ID to tax-residency certificate.
extracted.s36: GCC Startup provides a nominated UBO so your name stays off the public record. You keep full control and account access; we hold the nominee’s legal liability. Our most requested service.
extracted.s37: Speed and maturity. You skip incorporation and account-opening delays, and you gain an entity with history — useful for contracts, tenders and platforms that favour established companies.
extracted.s38: A ready-made company with an existing bank account and transaction history, transferred to you and operational within 24–48 hours. For when you need an established presence immediately.
extracted.s39: Launch your company in the UAE, Bahrain, Hong Kong & beyond — with real bank accounts, full privacy, and total ownership. Founder-led by a Finance Director. Set up in days, not months.
extracted.s40: Yes. A shelf company is a previously-registered, dormant entity kept compliant and transferred to a new owner — a long-standing, legal practice. You complete full KYC before transfer.
extracted.s41: Yes, though banking due diligence is rigorous. We pair offshore entities with substance-friendly banks or fintech providers and prepare the source-of-funds file to maximise approval.
extracted.s42: It bundles company registration, a bank account and the nominee appointment (nominee from $750). The exact figure depends on jurisdiction and number of accounts — confirmed up front.
extracted.s43: Local: Emirates NBD, FAB, RAK Bank, Mashreq and regional Gulf banks. Fintech: Wise, Airwallex, Statrys. We recommend based on your nationality, activity and where your customers are.
extracted.s44: Digital service providers, consultants, agencies, SaaS and e-commerce sellers earning from clients outside Hong Kong who want remote setup, clean banking and a 0% offshore position.
extracted.s45: High, because we pre-qualify you and prepare the file properly. We will tell you up front if a particular bank is unlikely to approve your profile rather than waste an application.
extracted.s46: No. A Declaration of Trust and Power of Attorney confirm you as the true owner and give you full authority. You control the bank account; the nominee acts only on your instruction.
extracted.s47: Yes. The nominee is a non-executive, compliance-only appointment. You hold the shares, control the bank account and run the business. The arrangement is documented to protect you.
extracted.s48: High-net-worth individuals, groups needing a neutral holding company, fund and investment vehicles, IP holding and clients for whom privacy and asset protection are the priority.
extracted.s49: We match your income, lifestyle, and tax situation to the jurisdiction that actually fits — not just the most popular one. Tap any country to see costs, timelines & requirements.
extracted.s50: The digital founder’s favourite: incorporate fully online in under three weeks, pay 0% on foreign-sourced profits, and bank fast with Airwallex & Wise — without ever flying out.
extracted.s51: "My Amazon FBA business now runs through a Hong Kong entity with Nominee UBO. Fully remote setup in under three weeks. The tax savings are significant and entirely above board."
extracted.s52: Enterprise-grade credibility with startup tax breaks, top-tier banking, and a resident nominee director included — so you own and control everything from anywhere in the world.
extracted.s53: Full company formation in the UAE, Bahrain, Hong Kong, Singapore, Ireland, BVI and more. Government fees included, no hidden charges — your entity registered and ready to bank.
extracted.s54: The existing account is retained and signatory control is updated to you after the bank completes its KYC on the new owner. We manage the change-of-control process end to end.

extracted.s56: UK and international founders needing a credible onshore EU base, SaaS and digital businesses selling into Europe, and groups wanting a low-tax EU trading or holding company.

extracted.s58: Global company registration and tax optimization. Founded by a Finance Director with deep UAE oil & gas corporate finance expertise. Trusted by 500+ entrepreneurs worldwide.
extracted.s59: If you trade within the EU or exceed thresholds, yes. Irish VAT registration requires demonstrating real economic activity; we guide the application and supporting evidence.
